posts.author: parkhi_nazar
posts.community: Wockhardt - A story with twist and turn
posts.text: From a technical perspective, the stock price is expectedly showing fatigue (was 20% up early in the morning, and as I type, it has given up 12% and is now 8% up). A sustainable re-rating into an innovator (the ultimate optimistic outcome) is a long-term story and will require patience to think beyond local maxima. And of course accepting the risk that this sustainable re-rating story may never materialize. Even for the near-term however, am planning to ride out the volatility. There is a near-term trigger still left - that Wockhardt may cut a deal with a global pharma giant. That will likely…

posts.text: Fast closing in 2500, best strategy for this stock is to lock in shares and dont look now, we may form any estimations and those might be correct to an extent, i am betting on future NCE potential from wockhardt apart from current 5 NCE portfolio. They might get into CDMO space as well as R&D capabilities are strong and proven. Cohance also has very strong R&D capabilities.
